projectDescription: AgentHeaven is a Python SDK and CLI for managing AI agent projects, providing environment isolation, LLM integration, knowledge base management, caching, and agentic programming utilities.
keyFeatures: LLM abstraction layer (LiteLLM-backed) supporting OpenAI, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Ollama and more
CLI tool (`ahvn`) for setup, configuration, chat, embedding, and repo management
Knowledge Base system (KLStore + KLEngine + KLBase) with vector, facet, MongoDB, and DAAC engines
Universal Knowledge Fragment (UKF) schema for structured knowledge, prompts, tools, and experiences
Multiple cache backends: in-memory, disk, JSON, database, MongoDB
Agentic programming decorators: @autocode, @autofunc, @autotask for LLM-driven code generation
Tool specification system (ToolSpec) for defining and registering agent tools
BaseAgentSpec framework for building multi-step, tool-using AI agents
Streaming-first LLM interface with structured output and tool-calling support
Hierarchical config management: system, global, and local config levels
publicApiSurface: BaseCache / InMemCache / DiskCache / JsonCache / DatabaseCache / MongoCache
BaseUKF / KnowledgeUKFT / ExperienceUKFT / PromptUKFT / ToolUKFT / DocumentUKFT
BaseKLEngine / DAACKLEngine / FacetKLEngine / VectorKLEngine / MongoKLEngine / ScanKLEngine
BaseAgentSpec.encode / step / is_done / decode / stream / run
ahvn setup / ahvn config / ahvn repo / ahvn chat / ahvn session / ahvn embed
